ThingDef.label: uniform, basic
ThingDef.description: These are simple garments that protect little more than the modesty of the wearer.

ThingDef.label: uniform, guard's
ThingDef.description: These are simple garments that protect little more than the modesty of the wearer.

ThingDef.label: imperial cap
ThingDef.description: A formal cap for military personnel.

ThingDef.label: imperial uniform cap
ThingDef.description: A formal cap for military personnel.

ThingDef.label: uniform, sashed
ThingDef.description: These are simple garments that protect little more than the modesty of the wearer.

ThingDef.label: imperial uniform, junior officer's
ThingDef.description: These are simple garments that protect little more than the modesty of the wearer.

ThingDef.label: imperial uniform, senior officer's
ThingDef.description: These are simple garments that protect little more than the modesty of the wearer.

ThingDef.label: imperial uniform, flag officer's
ThingDef.description: These are simple garments that protect little more than the modesty of the wearer.

ThingDef.label: imperial uniform, top brass
ThingDef.description: These are simple garments that protect little more than the modesty of the wearer.
